content: {"analyses": [{"source_url": "https://pmc.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/articles/PMC11566317/", "source_title": "The Role of Intermittent Fasting on Metabolic Syndrome - PMC - NIH", "source_type": "web", "source_quality": 0.7, "overall_relevance": 0.65, "year": 0, "authors": [], "venue": "", "doi": "", "atomic_facts": [{"statement": "Intermittent fasting has gained popularity as a dietary intervention to improve metabolic health.", "direct_quote": "Intermittent fasting has gained popularity as a dietary intervention to improve metabolic health.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "This systematic review and meta-analysis followed Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analysis (PRISMA) guidelines...", "direct_quote": "This systematic review and meta-analysis followed Preferred Reporting Items for Systematic Reviews and Meta-Analysis (PRISMA) guidelines and included 11 studies examining the effects of intermittent fasting on metabolic syndrome.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}, {"statement": "Data on weight, BMI, cholesterol, BP, and glucose levels were extracted, and a random effects meta-analysis was conducted to assess...", "direct_quote": "Data on weight, BMI, cholesterol, BP, and glucose levels were extracted, and a random effects meta-analysis was conducted to assess outcomes.", "fact_category": "causal_link", "relevance_score": 0.55, "confidence": 0.88, "perspective": "Scientific", "entities": []}], "evidence_summary": "Auto-extracted 3 facts from The Role of Intermittent Fasting on Metabolic Syndrome - PMC."}]}
